Title: Welcome to the Munich Oktoberfest

Published Time: Mon, 13 Apr 2026 12:05:34 GMT

Markdown Content:

![Image 7: Logo Landeshauptstadt München](https://www.oktoberfest.de/themes/custom/muenchen/assets/svg/logo/logo-lhm-muenchen.svg)

# Welcome to the Oktoberfest

The festival of the City of Munich. In 2026, the **191th Oktoberfest will take place from September 19 to October 4** on the Theresienwiese.

![Image 8: Eingangstor zum Oktoberfest "Willkommen zum Oktoberfest"](https://www.oktoberfest.de/sites/default/files/styles/intro_full_width/public/2024-05/2022_09_ger_muc_oktoberfest_03_general_135-2048x1365_mr.jpeg.webp)

## Oktoberfest 2026

158 Days

3 Hours

47 Minutes

36 Seconds

The time until the event is 158 Days, 3 Hours and 47 Minutes.

## All information about the largest folk festival in the world

Previous teaser

![Image 9: Die Cagey Strings spielen seit mehr als 25 Jahren im Hacker Festzelt](https://www.oktoberfest.de/sites/default/files/styles/3_2_w320/public/2026-03/mr_b3a0401.jpg?h=9855f42d)

Music Competition Oktoberfest 2026

### [Kickoff for “A Liad für d’Wiesn 2026”](https://www.oktoberfest.de/en/music_competition)

![Image 10: Tausende Zuschauer beim Platzkonzert 2024](https://www.oktoberfest.de/sites/default/files/styles/3_2_w320/public/2024-09/mr_b3a0792.jpg?h=9855f42d)

Tapping, parades, stand concert

### [All important Oktoberfest events at a glance](https://www.oktoberfest.de/en/information/events)

Opening times

### [All important information for a visit to the Wiesn](https://www.oktoberfest.de/en/information/service-visitors)
